verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Outbreathes His soul, in darkness trembling day

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Took refuge with the sun; twice dawned one day;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Its centre black night covered: from their base

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Mounts move in circle, wholly moved was earth,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 240 Saints’ sepulchres stood ope, and all things joined

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: In fear to see His passion whom they knew!

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: His lifeless side a soldier with bare spear

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Pierces, and forth flows blood, nor water less

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Thence followed.

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: These facts they agree to hide,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 245 And are unwilling the misdeed to own,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Willing to blink the crime.

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Without a body wear a robe? or is’t

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Susceptible of penalty? the wound

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Of violence does it bear? or die? or rise?

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 250 Is blood thence poured? from what flesh. since ye say

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: He had none? or else, rather, feigned He? if

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: ’Tis safe for you to say so; though you do

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: (Headlong) so say, by passing over more

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Is not, then, faith manifest?

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 255 And are not all things fixed?

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: The day before

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: He then should suffer, keeping Passover,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And handing down a memorable rite

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: To His disciples, taking bread alike

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And the vine’s juice, “My body, and My blood

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 260 Which is poured for you, this is,” did He say;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And bade it ever afterward be done.

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Of what created elements were made,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Think ye, the bread and wine which were (He said)

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: His body with its blood? and what must be

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 265 Confessed?

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Proved He not Himself the world’s

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Maker, through deeds? and that He bore at once

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: A body formed from flesh and blood?

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: This true Man, too, the Father’s Virtue ’neath

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: An Image, with the Father ever was,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 270 United both in glory and in age;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Because alone He ministers the words

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Of the All-Holder; whom He upon earth

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Accepts; through whom He all things did create:

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: God’s Son, God’s dearest Minister, is He!

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 275 Hence hath He generation, hence Name too,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Hence, finally, a kingdom; Lord from Lord;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Stream from perennial Fount!

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: He, He it was

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Who to the holy fathers (whosoe’er

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Among them doth profess to have “seen God”)—

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 280 God is our witness—since the origin

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Of this our world, appearing, opened up

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: The Father’s words of promise and of charge

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: From heaven high: He led the People out;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Smote through th’iniquitous nation; was Himself

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 285 The column both of light and of cloud’s shade;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And dried the sea; and bids the People go

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Right through the waves, the foe therein involved

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And covered with the flood and surge: a way

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Through deserts made He for the followers

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 290 Of His high biddings; sent down bread in showers

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: From heaven for the People; brake the rock;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Bedewed with wave the thirsty; and from God

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: The mandate of the Law to Moses spake

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: With thunder, trumpet-sound, and flamey column

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 295 Terrible to the sight, while men’s hearts shook.

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: After twice twenty years, with months complete,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Jordan was parted; a way oped; the wave

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Stood in a mass; and the tribes shared the land,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Their fathers’ promised boons!

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: The Father’s word,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 300 Speaking Himself by prophets’ mouth, that He

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Would come to earth and be a man, He did

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Predict; Christ manifestly to the earth

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Then, expected for our aid,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Life’s only Hope, the Cleanser of our flesh,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 305 Death’s Router, from th’ Almighty Sire’s empire

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: At length He came, and with our human limbs

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: He clothed Him.

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Adam—virgin—dragon—tree,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: The cause of ruin, and the way whereby

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Rash death us all had vanquisht! by the same

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 310 Our Shepherd treading, seeking to regain

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: His sheep—with angel—virgin—His own flesh—

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And the “tree’s” remedy; whence vanquisht man

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And doomed to perish was aye wont to go

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: To meet his vanquisht peers; hence, interposed,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 315 One in all captives’ room, He did sustain

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: In body the unfriendly penalty

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: With patience; by His own death spoiling death;

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Becomes salvation’s cause; and, having paid

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Throughly our debts by throughly suffering

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 320 On earth, in holy body, everything,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Seeks the infern! here souls, bound for their crime,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Which shut up all together by Law’s weight,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Without a guard, were asking for the boons

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Promised of old, hoped for, and tardy, He

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 325 To the saints’rest admitted, and, with light,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Brought back.

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: For on the third day mounting up,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: A victor, with His body by His Sire’s

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Virtue immense, (salvation’s pathway made,)

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And bearing God and man is form create,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 330 He clomb the heavens, leading back with Him

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Captivity’s first-fruits (a welcome gift

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: And a dear figure to the Lord), and took

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: His seat beside light’s Father, and resumed

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: The virtue and the glory of which, while

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: 335 He was engaged in vanquishing the foe

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: He had been stripped; conjoined with Spirit; bound

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: With flesh, on our part.

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Him, Lord, Christ, King, God,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: Judgment and kingdom given to His hand,

verses.book: Five Books in Reply to Marcion.
verses.text: The father is to send unto the orb.
